title: Bhopal Woke Up to 70 Foot Flames and Non Stop Explosions After a Firecracker Store Blew Up
description: A massive fire at the Soni Firecracker Shop on Bairagarh Road in Bhopal triggered powerful explosions and gutted the entire outlet. Firefighters battled the blaze for over three hours, but no casualties were reported as the incident occurred at night.
